'''ragïfyïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nym|nym]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-g-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nym|nym]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| ragïfyïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || rægïfyïfth || rægïfyïfj || rægïfyïfsh || rægïfyïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ragïfgïfyïfth || ragïfgïfyïfj || ragïfgïfyïfsh || ragïfgïfyïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ragïfyïfth || ragïfyïfj || ragïfyïfsh || ragïfyïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ragïffyïffth || ragïffyïffj || ragïffyïffsh || ragïffyïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ragïfyïfïf || ragïfyïfïf || ragïfyïfïf || ragïfyïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || ragïfyïfth || ragïfyïfj || ragïfyïfsh || ragïfyïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ragïfyïfïfl || ragïfyïfïfl || ragïfyïfïfl || ragïfyïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ragïfyïfïfïf || ragïfyïfïfïf || ragïfyïfïfïf || ragïfyïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || ragïfyïfïfn || ragïfyïfïfn || ragïfyïfïfn || ragïfyïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ragïfyïfïforo || ragïfyïfïforo || ragïfyïfïforo || ragïfyïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
